---
name: Skill Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to an existing skill
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: skill-improvement
assignees: ''
---

## Which Skill?
Name of the skill to improve: 

## What's Missing or Wrong?
What could be better?

## Suggested Improvement
How would you improve it?

## Examples
Provide examples of the improvement in action.

## Accounting Standards
Does this relate to specific standards?
- [ ] IFRS (specify): ___________
- [ ] US GAAP (specify): ___________
- [ ] Local regulation (specify): ___________
- [ ] Industry standard (specify): ___________

## Priority
How important is this?
- [ ] Critical - Skill doesn't work
- [ ] High - Missing key functionality
- [ ] Medium - Would be nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## Additional Context
Links to standards, examples, or other references.
